name: Angle
summary: Provides support for angles using either the current Tekla Structures units, or user defined units

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares this angle with another angle

methods.name: FromCurrentUnit
methods.summary: Creates an angle given in the current unit type

methods.name: FromDegrees
methods.summary: Creates an angle from a value in degrees

methods.name: FromRadians
methods.summary: Creates an angle from a value in radians

methods.name: Parse(String)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle in the current unit type

methods.name: Parse(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle in the current unit type

methods.name: Parse(String, IFormatProvider, Angle.UnitType)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle in the current unit type

methods.name: ToString.
methods.summary: Converts the represented angle to a string in the current units

methods.name: ToString(Angle.UnitType)
methods.summary: Converts the represented angle to a string in the given units

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.summary: Converts the represented angle to a string with the given parameters

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider, Angle.UnitType)
methods.summary: Converts the represented angle to a string with the given parameters

methods.name: TryParse(String, Angle.)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle in the current unit type

methods.name: TryParse(String, IFormatProvider, Angle.)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle in the current unit type

methods.name: TryParse(String, IFormatProvider, Angle.UnitType, Angle.)
methods.summary: Parses the given text as an angle in the current unit type

properties.name: CurrentUnitType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Tekla Structures current angle type

properties.name: CurrentUnitValue
properties.summary: Gets the value of the angle in the current unit

properties.name: DecimalPlaces
properties.summary: Gets the number of decimal places used for angles.

properties.name: Degrees
properties.summary: Gets the angle value in degrees

properties.name: Radians
properties.summary: Gets the angle value in radians
